info.title: Blockbuster.ai - The Ultimate Multi-API Hub
info.description: 115+ premium paid endpoints: Social Media Intelligence (Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook), AI/ML (ChatGPT, Copilot, Image Generation), E-commerce (Shopee, Amazon, AliExpress), Finance & Trading (TradingView, Bloomberg, Binance, Forex), Data Intelligence (Google SERP, News, Jobs), Media (YouTube, Spotify), Developer Tools (Translation, Scraping, Cloudflare Bypass), and Free Crypto APIs (DeFiLlama, CoinGecko, Hyperliquid, Polymarket). All endpoints require x402 micropayment in USDC on Base chain.
info.x-guidance: This API requires x402 payment per request. Send POST with JSON body to any endpoint. Include x-payment header with signed USDC payment. Agents: use this OpenAPI spec to discover all 115 endpoints. Each returns structured JSON with success/data pattern. Prices range from $0.05 to $0.20 per call.
